health_conditions: Fitzpatrick type 1 skin (never tans, always burns)

benefits.description: produces subtle tan-like appearance (not true tan for Fitzpatrick type 1); results in 'holiday tan' appearance

protocol_notes: User is Fitzpatrick type 1 with over a decade of Melanotan II use. Requires much higher dosages than typical 250mcg recommendations to see any effect. Achieves subtle 'have you been on holiday' appearance rather than traditional tan.
